results.note: Shift TSA genTime earlier than actual commitment to backdate anchor while keeping digest match
Widen review window close_after far beyond ceremony to allow late review acceptance
Change OTS observed_at_epoch_s to an earlier, favorable clock while keeping block height fixed
Drop TSA anchor entirely, leaving only OTS anchor to satisfy quorum root
Remove one trust domain from registry so quorum threshold silently recalculates to 1
Set both anchors to same trust_domain to fake independent quorum while reusing one witness key
Issue release before anchors verified by pointing release ordinal to pre-verification nonce/capability
Null out verified_anchor_set_digest binding so release capability derives without anchor verification
